arts.ttl: Man City, Barcelona transfer news: Bayern man reveals his happiness at club
arts.sum: Bayern Munich's Joshua Kimmich appears to be happy to be stay at the club following recent comments to German TV amid links to Barcelona and Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Manuel Neuer “believes” in Leon Goretzka after omission from Bayern Munich squad
arts.sum: Leon Goretzka has played just one minute of football across four games for Bayern Munich this season, but compatriot Manuel Neuer believes his teammate can bounce back after been excluded…

arts.ttl: Dinamo Zagreb vs Bayern Munich: Lineups, team news, how does a football club run out of right-backs, and more!
arts.sum: With Josip Stanišić already sidelined, Vincent Kompany has to deal with the reality of coaching his UCL debut without a single natural right-back. It’s early in the season but Bayern Munich already have a full blown injury crisis to deal with.

arts.ttl: The Week That Was: Leon Goretzka deserves better; Bayern Munich's big win against Kiel; and the new Champions League format is dumb
arts.sum: Bayern had a big win in the Bundesliga this weekend and will enter the new, dumb Champions League this week. I know that during the Thomas Tuchel mistake era a large number of Bayern fans wanted somebody to blame for the club's misfortunes, and they settled in Leon.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich admit Jamal Musiala 'difficulties' to place Premier League on red alert
arts.sum: Germany's star attacking midfielder Jamal Musiala is attracting interest from the Premier League and Real Madrid as negotiations with Bayern Munich over a new contract stall

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Max Eberl on Jamal Musiala contract extension talks: “Difficult yes, but not impossible”
arts.sum: Speaking on Sport1 Dopa (via @iMiaSanMia), Bayern Munich Sporting CEO Max Eberl commented on Jamal Musiala’s contract situation. Musiala’s contract at Bayern expires in the summer of 2026 and it is well…

arts.ttl: Leon Goretzka to return to Bayern Munich’s squad for Champions League tie
arts.sum: Bild reports that Leon Goretzka will return to Bayern Munich’s squad for their opening Champions League tie against Dinamo Zagreb on Tuesday. The midfielder has only played one minute for Bayern…

arts.ttl: Köhn reflects on "storybook" Bundesliga debut, looks ahead to meeting with former club Bayern
arts.sum: New SV Werder Bremen signing Derrick Köhn was full of elation after scoring a game-winning goal 125 seconds into his Bundesliga debut yesterday. The 25-year-old may have something further to add against his former club Bayern in next weekend's league fixture.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Max Eberl says signing of “underrated” Hiroki Itō was linked to Alphonso Davies’ contract situation
arts.sum: The announcement of the signing of Hiroki Itō as the first 2024 summer signing for Bayern Munich was a bolt out of the blue, shocking fans and reporters alike by its secrecy. But just because the club was able to keep the secret for so long does not mean the executives are not willing to discuss why the signing of the former VfB Stuttgart player was made.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich reveal Matthijs de Ligt concern which led to Man Utd sale
arts.sum: Asked to explain Bayern's decision to offload De Ligt, Eberl said: "I followed [the fan response], including the petition. The Dutchman's departure was not a popular one among fans, who had started a huge petition urging Bayern to keep hold of De Ligt before his eventual exit.
